title: trifolium pilulare
intro: Trifolium pilulare, also known as the 'pulverized clover', is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Trifolium pilulare include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Trifolium pilulare can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
